attacking_style: Not an attacker. Role is pure domestique work—controlling breaks, executing leadouts, and maintaining tempo. No personal offensive shown across observations.
team_tactics: Team deploys him as tactical leadout specialist for intermediate sprint bonuses (3+ observations) and as enforcer to police break formations. Solo chase responsibilities when team tactics fail.
terrain_preference: Valley roads and flat-to-rolling sections where he controls pace and delivers teammates. Explicitly distanced on Classics climbs (Oude Kwaremont), suggesting hard climbing exposes limitations.
vulnerability: Isolated when team loses race control—forced into extended solo chasing (50km+ Catalunya). Dropped on punchy Classics climbs when surge attacks occur.
key_patterns: Intermediate sprint leadout specialist: piloted teammates through bonuses in 3 separate stage races
Break policing role: positioned early to control dangerous move formation, classic super-domestique work
Sacrificial chaser when tactics fail: solo pursuit duties for 50km+ when team misses breaks
Distanced on explosive Classics climbs: Oude Kwaremont attack shed him, revealing power ceiling
form_trajectory: neutral: Most recent 2022 observation shows continued domestique excellence (leadout duties), consistent with 2019-2021 pattern. Role unchanged, execution reliable.
